slides.headline: Detecting Fraud: Key Indicators
slides.body: Understand the red flags that signal potential fraud and learn how to respond effectively.

slides.headline: Identify Red Flags
slides.body: Learn to recognize common signs of fraud in VA school certification processes.

slides.headline: Investigation Protocols
slides.body: Follow established procedures to investigate suspected fraud.

slides.headline: Prevention Strategies
slides.body: Implement proactive measures to prevent fraud in your certification process.

slides.headline: Collaborate with SAA
slides.body: Work closely with your State Approving Agency to maintain compliance.

slides.headline: Stay Informed
slides.body: Stay current with VA guidance to ensure ongoing compliance.
Access the full guide now. Link in bio.

outline.caption: Discover how to identify fraud, investigate incidents, and prevent future occurrences with our essential guide for VASCOs. Stay compliant and protect student veterans. Access the full guide now. Link in bio.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is 'Collaborate with SAA' as it could benefit from a more concise bullet point list to ensure clarity and readability.
